content.full_text:
February 5, 2004

Gary S. Rotto
9189 Rebecca Avenue
San Diego, CA 92123

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-017

Dear Mr. Rotto:

This letter is to notify you that, per our telephone conversation of February 4, 2004, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice regarding your filing requirements under the Political Reform Act.

If you have any additional questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
